rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; all other headlines are distant or continuation events with no new qualitative impact on Romania.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — confidence vote pending
top_events.summary: Liberal PM nominee still awaiting parliamentary confidence vote; political uncertainty continues to affect governance and EU funds absorption in Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut
top_events.summary: Continued Beirut strikes add minor energy price volatility risk for Romania but no new escalation near the Black Sea region.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Ukraine's EU accession progress is a mild positive for Romania's eastern neighborhood stability but remains a known continuation.
